## [Note]

dbbot v0.9.0 is the official release after the v0.9.0 beta validation cycle.

The default MySQL example value in dbbot remains MySQL 9.7.0. MySQL 9.7 generic Linux packages require a glibc 2.28 compatible operating system, so documentation examples for CentOS and RHEL 7 compatible labs use the latest intended MySQL 8.4 patch release instead.

## [Add]

- Add an interactive Linux portable Ansible setup prompt that can install python3 when it is missing on the control host.
- Add classic MHA and MHA-Go unsafe uninstall playbooks.
- Add post-uninstall acceptance checks for classic MHA, MHA-Go, and MySQL instance cleanup.

## [Change]

- Document CentOS 7 python3 expectations for portable Ansible setup.
- Align MySQL documentation examples with the latest intended MySQL 8.4 patch release for EL7 compatible labs.
- Use curl based release and MySQL package download examples for minimal Linux environments.
- Expand uninstall confirmation text to cover MHA and MHA-Go cleanup.

## [Fix]

- Reject MySQL 9.7 deployments early on CentOS 7, Red Hat 7, and BigCloud 7 systems.
- Make MySQL unsafe uninstall tolerate partial installations where the systemd unit is already absent.
- Remove MySQL systemd unit files from both common systemd unit directories during unsafe uninstall.
- Make classic MHA manager VIP acceptance checks deterministic without noisy ignored retry failures.
- Correct the MHA-Go documentation example for passing the default password confirmation extra variable.
